message:
Command `# Memory jumped from 8.9% to 29.8% (was 732MB, now ~2.5GB)!
# CPU time increased from 7638 to 8336 = 700 more seconds in 10 minutes = normal
# rchar still frozen at 220MB, 4 FDs still only
# But MEMORY JUMPED 3x! The process loaded the 206MB ODB into memory!
# (ODB was likely mmap'd, which doesn't show in read_bytes but inflates RSS)
# Progress! The antenna check IS now running.
# Let's keep monitoring:
sleep 1200
ps -p 625425 -o pid,stat,pcpu,pmem,etime --no-header 2>/dev/null || echo "ANTENNA CHECK DONE"
cat /proc/625425/stat 2>/dev/null | awk '{print "CPU time (secs):", $14/100}'
cat /proc/625425/status 2>/dev/null | grep "VmRSS"
cat /workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/openlane/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper/runs/pnr_run_v4/36-openroad-checkantennas-1/openroad-checkantennas-1.log 2>/dev/null | tail -10 || echo "log empty"
echo "---Steps---"
ls /workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/openlane/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper/runs/pnr_run_v4/ | grep "^[0-9]" | tail -5` executed with exit code 0.

content:
ANTENNA CHECK DONE
[INFO] Setting output delay to: 5.0
[INFO] Setting input delay to: 5.0
[WARNING STA-0441] set_output_delay relative to a clock defined on the same port/pin not allowed.
[INFO] Setting load to: 0.033442
[INFO] Setting clock uncertainty to: 0.25
[INFO] Setting clock transition to: 0.1499999999999999944488848768742172978818416595458984375
[INFO] Setting timing derate to: 5%
[WARNING STA-0441] set_output_delay relative to a clock defined on the same port/pin not allowed.
[INFO] No information on clock propagation in input SDC file-- propagating all clocks.
%OL_CREATE_REPORT /workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/openlane/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper/runs/pnr_run_v4/36-openroad-checkantennas-1/reports/antenna.rpt
---Steps---
32-openroad-globalrouting
33-openroad-detailedrouting
34-openroad-detailedrouting
35-odb-removeroutingobstructions
36-openroad-checkantennas-1
